name: aura-memory
description: Cognitive memory layer for AI agents. Gives Claude persistent, self-organizing memory with hierarchical decay, belief formation, and causal reasoning. Zero LLM calls, sub-millisecond recall.
author: Alexander Tepliuk

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Retrieve relevant memories as context for a query. Call BEFORE answering to check existing knowledge.

tools.name: recall_structured
tools.description: Retrieve memories as structured data with scores, levels, and metadata.

tools.name: store
tools.description: Store a new memory. Levels: working (hours), decisions (days), domain (weeks), identity (months+).

tools.name: store_code
tools.description: Store a code snippet at DOMAIN level with language metadata.

tools.name: store_decision
tools.description: Store a decision with reasoning and rejected alternatives at DECISIONS level.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search memory by filters (exact/tag-based). Use for browsing or counting.

tools.name: insights
tools.description: Get memory health stats: decay risks, promotion candidates, conflicts, trends.

tools.name: consolidate
tools.description: Merge similar memory records to reduce bloat.

tools.name: delete
tools.description: Delete a memory record by ID.

tools.name: get
tools.description: Get a specific memory record by ID with full metadata (level, tags, strength).

tools.name: maintain
tools.description: Run a full maintenance cycle: decay, promote, consolidate, archive. Returns a summary report.

password.description: Optional encryption password for encrypted brain
